# Pull Request

## Type

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Chore

## Summary

Provide a brief description of the changes made.

## Motivation

Why was this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## Changes

List the key changes introduced in this pull request.

-
-
-

## Bug Details (if applicable)

### Issue

Describe the bug.

### Root Cause

Explain what caused the issue.

### Resolution

Describe how the bug was fixed.

## Feature Details (if applicable)

Describe the new functionality, including any important implementation details or design decisions.

## Screenshots

If applicable, include screenshots or recordings.

## Testing

Describe how these changes were tested.

### Test Cases

- [ ] Existing functionality verified
- [ ] New functionality tested
- [ ] Edge cases considered
- [ ] Responsive/UI tested (if applicable)

Additional notes:

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] This PR introduces breaking changes.

If yes, describe the impact and any required migration steps.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's coding standards.
- [ ] Self-review completed.
- [ ] Documentation updated where necessary.
- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate.
- [ ] Existing tests pass.
- [ ] No unnecessary debug code or commented code remains.

## Related Issues

Closes #

## Additional Notes

Include any additional context, implementation notes, or future work.
